name: Leftover Turkey or Chicken Hash
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked Turkey, diced (up to 3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chicken fat if desired and onions; cook until onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add celery and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
4. Add the remaining cooked turkey and stir to combine.
5. Cook until heated through, stirring occasionally, about 10-15 minutes.
6. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
7. Serve hot.
